short: Mistral AI's family of models specialized for code generation and completion.
definition: Codestral is Mistral AI's family of models specialized for software development, trained to generate, complete, and explain code across many programming languages. It is designed for tasks like fill-in-the-middle completion (filling in code between an existing beginning and end) and writing functions from plain-language descriptions, and is offered through Mistral's interface for use in editors and developer tools.
